reviews.comment:
Son un desastre!!! Lavo normalmente mi auto ahí, desde que lo hago se me indicó siempre que era por orden de llegada. En el día de hoy llegué 8.45 porque abren a las 9, el empleado llego 9 y 20, y cuando me acerque para dejarle la llave, me indica de muy mala manera, que había un auto previo que había sacado turno!!! Al decirle que no se dan turnos , que eso es lo que ellos predican, me dice que el señor era socio del Aca y que por eso a él sí se le daba turno y que en consecuencia habiendo llegado primero, mi auto iba a estar para la una y media de la tarde! Alterando mi programa laboral de viernes! Son impresentables!!! Obviamente no lo dejé y no volveré a pisar esa estación de servicio, que de servicio, realmente tiene muy poco!!

(Translated by Google)
They're a disaster!!! I usually wash my car there, and I've always been told it's first-come, first-served. Today I arrived at 8:45 because they open at 9, the employee arrived at 9:20, and when I went to give him the keys, he rudely told me there was a car ahead of me that had made a reservation!!! When I told him they don't give reservations, which is what they preach, he said the man was a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) and that's why he got a reservation, and that consequently, since I arrived first, my car wouldn't be ready until 1:30 in the afternoon! This completely messed up my Friday work schedule! They're unprofessional!!! Obviously, I didn't leave it there and I'll never set foot in that gas station again, which is anything but a service station!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURSOGZuYmtBRRAB
